name: Silesian Voivodeship (Poland)

colors.symbolism: the field of the Upper Silesian arms
the gold of the Silesian eagle

description: Three horizontal stripes of blue, yellow, and blue, with the central yellow stripe half the width of the outer blue stripes.
history: Adopted by the Silesian Voivodeship after its formation in 1999, drawing on the historic heraldic tinctures of Upper Silesia.

features.symbolism: blue and yellow taken from the historic coat of arms of Upper Silesia
